original_registry_entry.exact_document_title: Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Dysuria
original_registry_entry.population: People presenting with dysuria in telehealth, with age, sex, pregnancy, comorbidity, recurrence, and complicated-infection qualifiers.
original_registry_entry.clinical_setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
original_registry_entry.applicability_note: UAE-direct for selected dysuria history, red-flag prompts, urinalysis, culture, and qualified renal-testing documentation. Physical examination, diagnosis, medicine, treatment, referral urgency, and non-telehealth pathways remain clinician responsibilities.

exact_sections.heading: Scope, purpose, and applicability
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Defines DHA-licensed telehealth dysuria scope and qualified applicability.

exact_sections.heading: Clinical history for dysuria
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports onset, persistence, severity, duration, location, fever, rigors, nausea, vomiting, flank pain, medicine or procedure context, pregnancy and sexual context, trauma or irritants, haematuria, frequency, urgency, and voiding symptoms.

exact_sections.heading: Red flags and referral criteria
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports fever with flank pain or tenderness, vomiting, visible haematuria, pregnancy, diabetes, immunosuppression, and recurrence as prompts only, without automatic urgency or referral output.

exact_sections.heading: Investigations
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports urinalysis, recommendation-qualified urine culture, and renal-function or electrolyte review in qualified pyelonephritis, nausea, or vomiting contexts.

title: Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Dysuria
population: People presenting with dysuria in telehealth, with age, sex, pregnancy, comorbidity, recurrence, and complicated-infection qualifiers.
intended_setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
access_limitations: Algorithm or figure references preserved as locators; diagram structure not interpreted
